info.name: AP2 Assignment 3 - Medical Scheduling gRPC Reference
info.description: Importable reference collection only. Do not press Send on items. Use New -> gRPC Request in Postman to invoke this project. Postman does not import executable gRPC requests as REST collection JSON.

request.description:
REFERENCE ONLY - DO NOT CLICK SEND ON THIS COLLECTION ITEM.

Postman imported collections are HTTP-mode. This project is gRPC-only.
To execute: click New -> gRPC Request, enter the server URL and method below, paste the message JSON, then click Invoke.

IMPORTANT: This is an importable Postman reference item. Postman does not import executable gRPC requests from collection JSON like REST.

To run it: New -> gRPC Request -> server URL: localhost:8081 -> plaintext/no TLS -> select method: doctor.DoctorService/CreateDoctor.

Proto file: internal/doctor/proto/doctor.proto

Message JSON:
{
  "full_name": "Dr. Aisha Seitkali",
  "specialization": "Cardiology",
  "email": "a.seitkali@clinic.kz"
}

Expected event: doctors.created

REFERENCE ONLY - DO NOT CLICK SEND ON THIS COLLECTION ITEM.

Postman imported collections are HTTP-mode. This project is gRPC-only.
To execute: click New -> gRPC Request, enter the server URL and method below, paste the message JSON, then click Invoke.

IMPORTANT: This is an importable Postman reference item. Postman does not import executable gRPC requests from collection JSON like REST.

To run it: New -> gRPC Request -> server URL: localhost:8081 -> plaintext/no TLS -> select method: doctor.DoctorService/GetDoctor.

Proto file: internal/doctor/proto/doctor.proto

Message JSON:
{
  "id": "{{doctor_id}}"
}

Expected: doctor response or NotFound.

item.name: REFERENCE ONLY - How To Use In Postman

request.description:
REFERENCE ONLY - DO NOT CLICK SEND ON THIS COLLECTION ITEM.

Postman imported collections are HTTP-mode. This project is gRPC-only.
To execute: click New -> gRPC Request, enter the server URL and method below, paste the message JSON, then click Invoke.

Postman cannot run these as normal REST requests. Use New -> gRPC Request. Server URLs: localhost:8081 and localhost:8082. Reflection is enabled, or import the proto files manually.
